a pixie  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search

Deposit larger images inside the Media tab!

Uploaded February 27th, 2026 by iventheassassin

  • This mob spawns at /waypoint 000 (roams) in Toxxulia Forest.
  • Faction:
  • Attackable: Yes
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2026-02-27 08:45:02.

Minimum Level: 14
Maximum Level: 17
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Arrow of Contagion
Pixie Dust

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest

Report a correction

Post Comment
meh Tox
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2008 at 8:55 AM Rating: Good
UnholyCzars
View User Forum
Sage
756 posts
There's got to be a PH for them. I found one when I came in and none in the next 90 mins. Went to Gfay. :-D

Fight smarter not harder.
▲ Page top
A Pixie in Lesser Fay
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2005 at 1:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260068831
Scholar
28 posts
I was wandering around in Lesser Faydark today, and saw "a pixie" traveling east along the southern edge of the zone. I didn't kill it as I was unsure whether I would take a faction hit or not, so I cannot say if it was the same as the 'a pixie's in Toxxulia forest with no faction.
▲ Page top
Aww
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2003 at 9:04 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591772301552
2 posts
They look so innocent, don't they?
▲ Page top
great cash
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2003 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966261150
35 posts
every time I head through here with my 31 ranger I still check track for these suckers. I have had them drop as much as 36 gold. If you are a non-twink that's not too bad for something you can solo by you'r late teens.
▲ Page top
hey
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2002 at 10:31 PM Rating: Decent

# Aug 04 2001 at 12:26 PM Rating: Excellent

▲ Page top
Not 1-4 at all
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2001 at 7:19 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I fought one of these today with my level 20 Shaman and it conned blue to me and would hit as high as 30-38 dmg and sometimes double hit in the 30's. Dropped 25 Gold and 50 Copper the first time and 6 gold and 30 copper the second time. Definitely in the upper teens as far as level goes, but I have also fought some closer to the city tunnel that I whacked with only one or two hits and gave only a few copper as loot so there must be two different spawns of these.
▲ Page top
faction?
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2001 at 9:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249379392
2 posts
Does killing Pixies in Tox affect faction?
▲ Page top
RE: faction?
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2001 at 1:09 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have killed a couple of these Toxx Pixies and they did not have any faction whatsoever.

# Jun 07 2001 at 8:11 AM Rating: Default

__DEL__1591778490362
52 posts
the only 2 zones with pixies are lfay and gfay when you are finally high enough for lfay pixies wont aggro and by the time you actually get KoS to a pixie in gfday youi can bat them off by the thousands and please post it on the pixie TRICKSTER page

higher level top
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2000 at 3:19 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My bro and I, cam though this zone while he was level 16 and i was 12, a pixie we saw conned red to both of us. So the level max is probably a little low.
▲ Page top
RE: higher level top
QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 1:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248442334
6 posts
It conned red at level 15 for me too, so the max level is certainly not level 17 (which would be a yellow con at 15).

QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2000 at 5:14 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
hehe, he was probably fighting a "bixie", not "pixie"
▲ Page top
Level on Pixies
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2000 at 3:44 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hey Lalamank...you probably killed a pixie trickster, or a pixie prankster...they're lower level pixies...the just plain "pixie"'s are level 14ish...just lettin ya know =)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2000 at 2:06 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That guy above that thinks its 1-4 is dumb it must be a bixie or sumthin
Wrong
QuoteReply
# May 03 2000 at 2:34 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Sorry Bud. This one isn't a 4th lvl Pixie. A couple of friends and I were exploring Toxx out of bordom when this little gal jumped us. We were around 13th level at least. It was a fun fight, and she drops good loot, but I still hated killing the little bugger.

I fought one of these, with my level 3 enc so change it! its like lvl 1-4

um HELLO if you were fighting one in Tox then it SHOULD be 14-21. If it said only "pixie" then you're mistaken, I believe.

# Oct 06 2000 at 8:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
*chortle* *chortle* BS. The pixies in Tox are High lvls. It was in G. Fay that the pixie TRICKSTERS are low lvls.

▲ Page top
I love these things
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2000 at 8:36 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
They drop insane amounts of money (I've gotten four plat from one), they drop a lot of words (I've gotten some every time I've killed one), and they're so cute when they die. What more could you ask for. I think every monster should loot this well and have such a comical little shriek.
▲ Page top
RE: I love these things

DONT KILL THE PIXIES!!!! They're cute!
